chunks.text: A Method for Optimal Passive Component Sizing in Phase-Shifted Pulse Width Modulated Flying Capacitor Multilevel Converters Applied to Space Robotics (EECS-2025-226) Elisa Krause
chunks.question: What is the title and author of the technical report EECS-2025-226?
chunks.answer: Optimal passive sizing for space robotics converters by Elisa Krause.

chunks.text: Dynamical Modeling and Control of the Flying Capacitor Multilevel Converter (EECS-2025-105) Rahul Iyer, Robert Pilawa-Podgurski, Claire Tomlin, Seth R. Sanders and Thierry Meynard
chunks.question: Who are the authors of the dynamical modeling report for flying capacitor converters?
chunks.answer: Iyer, Pilawa-Podgurski, Tomlin, Sanders, and Meynard.

chunks.text: Split-Phase and Multi-Resonant Operation of Hybrid Switched-Capacitor Converters (EECS-2024-189) Rose Abramson and Robert Pilawa-Podgurski
chunks.question: What does report EECS-2024-189 focus on regarding hybrid converters?

chunks.text: Switching Schemes for Hybrid Switched-Capacitor DC-DC Power Converters (EECS-2023-276) Maggie Blackwell
chunks.question: What is the topic of Maggie Blackwell's technical report?
chunks.answer: Switching schemes for hybrid switched-capacitor converters.

chunks.text: Hybrid Switched-Capacitor Converter Design: State-Space Dynamical Modeling and Passive Device Characterization (EECS-2023-218) Nathan Brooks and Robert Pilawa-Podgurski
chunks.question: What aspects are covered in the hybrid converter design report?
chunks.answer: State-space modeling and passive device characterization.

chunks.text: High Performance Hybrid Switched-Capacitor Converters for Aerospace Applications (EECS-2023-79) Sam Coday and Robert Pilawa-Podgurski
chunks.question: What application is targeted in the high-performance converters report?

chunks.text: Integrated Hybrid Switched-Capacitor Converters for Point of Load Power Delivery (EECS-2022-243) Pourya Assem
chunks.question: What is the purpose of integrated hybrid converters in this report?
chunks.answer: Point of load power delivery applications.

chunks.text: Circuits and Control for High-Performance Grid-tied Ac-Dc Conversion Systems (EECS-2022-22) Zitao Liao, Robert Pilawa-Podgurski, Seth R. Sanders, Duncan Callaway and Minjie Chen
chunks.question: Which authors contributed to the grid-tied conversion systems report?
chunks.answer: Liao, Pilawa-Podgurski, Sanders, Callaway, and Chen.

chunks.text: Design, Modeling and Control of the Integrated Stacked Resonant Switched Capacitor DC-DC Converter (EECS-2019-155) Yongjun Li
chunks.question: What converter type is designed in Yongjun Li's report?
chunks.answer: Integrated stacked resonant switched capacitor converter.
